prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: CRYSTAL STRUCTURE OF CYSTALYSIN FROM TREPONEMA DENTICOLA CONTAINS A PYRIDOXAL 5'-PHOSPHATE COFACTOR. Entity description: CYSTALYSIN. Organism: Treponema denticola. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency; public metadata indicates multiple polymer instances or molecule copies. Coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before the prediction hash.

V69 E65 metadata context marks: assembly_context cofactor_context ligand_context oligomer_context partner_copy_context. Known E65 marks are allowed; hard-topology discovery labels are withheld from prediction. Coordinates, contacts, ligand geometry, native topology, and post-seal validation labels are blocked before sealing.
